source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/01_HAD1717MC(MG)/▶ CE MDD/■ 3. 3차 CE TCF 보안사항 제출 (12월10일)/08. PMS & PMCF/Vigilance report 2_12-1_rev_08.pdf

document.title: MEDDEV 2 12-1 rev. 8 Vigilance
document.documentType: Medical Devices Vigilance System report form annexes

sourceSummary.oneLine: Annexes from MEDDEV 2.12/1 rev 8 Vigilance provide manufacturer and competent authority report forms for medical device vigilance.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used as report forms/templates for Manufacturer’s Incident Reports, Field Safety Corrective Action reports, Field Safety Notices, Periodic Summary Reports, Trend Reports, and National Competent Authority Reports.
keyPoints: Annex 3 is a Manufacturer’s Incident Report form for the Medical Devices Vigilance System.
Annex 4 is a Manufacturer’s Field Safety Corrective Action Report form.
Annex 5 is a template for an Urgent Field Safety Notice.
Annex 6 is a Manufacturer’s Periodic Summary Report form.
Annex 7 is a Manufacturer’s Trend Report form.
Annex 8 is a National Competent Authority Report format for NCAR participants only.

entities.name: MHRA
entities.evidence: To which NCA(s) is this report being sent? MHRA

entities.name: NCAR participants
entities.evidence: This form should be used for the exchange of medical device information between NCAR participants only.

concepts.name: Manufacturer’s Incident Report
concepts.evidence: Report Form Manufacturer’s Incident Report Medical Devices Vigilance System (MEDDEV 2.12/1 rev 8)

concepts.name: Field Safety Corrective Action
concepts.evidence: REPORT FORM FOR FIELD SAFETY CORRECTIVE ACTION

concepts.name: Serious public health threat
concepts.evidence: Does the incident represent a serious public health threat? Yes No

evidence.claim: The source is from MEDDEV 2.12/1 revision 8 on vigilance.
Annex 3 is a report form for manufacturer incident reports to the national competent authority.
evidence.evidenceText: 10.3 ANNEX 3 - REPORT FORM FOR MANUFACTURER’S TO THENATIONAL COMPETENT AUTHORITY

evidence.claim: The Manufacturer’s Incident Report is part of the Medical Devices Vigilance System.
evidence.evidenceText: Report Form Manufacturer’s Incident Report Medical Devices Vigilance System (MEDDEV 2.12/1 rev 8)

evidence.claim: The incident report form captures incident classifications including death, unanticipated serious deterioration in state of health, and all other reportable incidents.
evidence.evidenceText: Classification of incident Death Unanticipated serious deterioration in state of health All other reportable incidents

evidence.claim: The incident report form includes medical device class selections under AIMD, MDD, and IVD categories.
evidence.evidenceText: Class AIMD Active implants IVDAnnexIIListA MDD Class III IVDAnnexIIListB MDD Class IIb IVDDevicesforself-testing MDD Class IIa IVDGeneral MDD Class I

evidence.claim: Annex 4 is a manufacturer field safety corrective action report form.
evidence.evidenceText: 10.4 ANNEX 4 - REPORT FORM FOR FIELD SAFETY CORRECTIVE ACTION Report Form Manufacturer’s Field Safety Corrective ActionReport

evidence.claim: The FSCA report in the source identifies MHRA as the NCA to which the report is being sent.
evidence.evidenceText: To which NCA(s) is this report being sent? MHRA

evidence.claim: The FSCA report includes a report date of 06/30/2017.
The FSCA report identifies DSMAREF CO.,LTD. as the manufacturer.
Annex 5 provides a template for an Urgent Field Safety Notice.
evidence.evidenceText: 10.5 ANNEX 5 - Template for a Field Safety Notice Urgent Field Safety Notice

evidence.claim: The Field Safety Notice template calls for details on affected devices sufficient to identify affected product.
evidence.evidenceText: Specific details to enable the affected product to be easily identified e.g. type of device, model name and number, batch/ serial numbers of affected devices and part or order number.

evidence.claim: Annex 6 is a Manufacturer’s Periodic Summary Report form.
evidence.evidenceText: 10.6 ANNEX 6 -Manufacturer’s PERIODIC SUMMARY REPORT FORM Report Form Manufacturer’s PeriodicSummary Report (PSR)

evidence.claim: The PSR form includes summary periods of every month, every 2 months, every 3 months, every 6 months, and every 12 months.
evidence.evidenceText: Summary period agreed: Every month Every2months Every3months Every6months Every12months

evidence.claim: Annex 7 is a Manufacturer’s Trend Report form.
evidence.evidenceText: 10.7 ANNEX 7-MANUFACTURER’S TRENDREPORT FORM Report Form Manufacturer’s Trend Report

evidence.claim: The Trend Report form includes fields for trend identification date, trend narrative, analysis period, and established trigger level.
evidence.evidenceText: Date the trend was identified Description narrative for identified trend Time period of trend analysis Established trigger level

evidence.claim: Annex 8 is a National Competent Authority Report format.
evidence.evidenceText: 10.8 ANNEX 8 - NATIONAL COMPETENT AUTHORITY REPORT FORMAT

evidence.claim: The National Competent Authority Report form is for exchange of medical device information between NCAR participants only and completed forms should not be released to the public.
evidence.evidenceText: This form should be used for the exchange of medical device information between NCAR participants only. Completed forms should not be released to the public.

reviewFlags.reason: No document publication date is present; 06/30/2017 appears only as a report date within the Annex 4 form.
No specific product model is completed in the source text despite product metadata signal.
Authority information is partly generic; MHRA is shown in one FSCA form field, while most forms refer generally to National Competent Authority.
OCR/text extraction contains spacing and word-joining artifacts such as 'THENATIONAL', 'Field Safety Corrective ActionReport', and spaced page numbers.
